blurb.en: Among all screened tickers, ORCL is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 55.3% from its peak, with RSI at the 0th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Our AI formula weighs long-term trend, momentum, drawdown depth, and market fear together. Formula score: 88.5/100.
blurb.zh: 本期所有篩選標的中，ORCL 的入場訊號最強。距高點回撤 55.3%，RSI 百分位 0%，歷史上這個位置的定投勝率相對較高。我們的 AI 公式綜合長期趨勢、動能、回撤深度與市場恐慌四項指標加權計算。公式評分：88.5/100。

blurb.en: MSFT has dipped 31.6% off its 52-week high — meaningful for a name of this size and stability. With RSI at just the 17th percentile, momentum is compressed and the market has repriced this blue chip lower. For long-term DCA investors, this is the kind of setup our formula is designed to flag. Smart DCA score: 81.4/100.
blurb.zh: MSFT 距 52 週高點下滑 31.6%，對這類規模的藍籌股來說是相當顯著的回撤。RSI 僅在第 17 百分位，動能明顯收縮，市場已對這支藍籌股重新定價。對長期定投者而言，這正是我們公式設計來捕捉的訊號。智能定投評分：81.4/100。

blurb.en: TMUS is down 35.0% from its high, placing RSI at the 20th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — and this kind of reset is exactly where our AI formula tends to find its best entries. High volatility cuts both ways, but dollar-cost averaging into weakness has historically been a strong approach for this category. Entry score: 83.3/100.
blurb.zh: TMUS 距高點下跌 35.0%，RSI 歷史百分位 20%。成長股波動幅度大，而這類深度修正正是我們 AI 公式最常找到優質入場點的位置。高波動是雙面刃，但在弱勢中持續定投，歷史上對這類標的效果顯著。入場評分：83.3/100。

blurb.en: XRP-USD has pulled back 60.8% with RSI at the 0th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Alternative assets often move independently of equities, making them a useful diversification layer in a DCA portfolio. Smart DCA score: 85.0/100.
blurb.zh: XRP-USD 回撤 60.8%，RSI 百分位 0%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。另類資產的走勢通常與股市相關性較低，在定投組合中能提供有效的分散效果。公式評分：85.0/100。
